title: geraniospermum fissifolium
intro: Geraniospermum fissifolium, also known as the "Snake Grass," is a plant species that belongs to the family Menispermaceae and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Its health benefits include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, Geraniospermum fissifolium is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and its roots are used to make a medicinal tea.
